visa_types.name: Tourism
visa_types.documents_required:
- Application form signed by the applicant. Kindly check the Application Form section for further information about the requirements of the application form. (Kindly note that incomplete application forms will not be accepted.)
- Original Passport with at least 6 months validity from date of travel. Kindly note that for Syrian Nationals; Passport whose validity has been extended are not accepted. (Passport validity will be considered as mentioned in the biometric page of the passport) Benin identity card, and a resident/work permit with at least 6 months validity from date of submission of your application at the Visa Application Centre.
- Copy of the passport and Residence permit.
- Entry and exit seal/stamps of all previously obtained visas, if any.
- Current biometric photo (with a white background, taken in the last 6 months, with the face clearly visible, in 5x6 size).
- Round trip flight pre-reservation. (It is highly recommended that you do not confirm the flight ticket before the visa is issued)
- Hotel reservation (pre-reservation) or title deed in case if any property in Turkey.
- Travel medical insurance valid for the duration of the visa or Copy of the insurance card and policy certificate indicating the area of coverage in Turkey.
- Family registration certificate issued in the name of the applicant (for family applications) and a copy of the birth certificate of minors in English is required. (If Birth Certificate is in French or any other language it has to be legally translated in English or Turkish. Kindly note that the birth certificate in only required if the name of the parents is not mentioned in the Passport.) Please click here (http://liftpoc.vfsglobal.com.s3-website.eu-central-1.amazonaws.com/are/en/tur/important-information.html) for the documents required for minors travelling to Turkey.
- Work documents to be prepared by the applicant himself/herself or the person providing him/her:
- If applicant is an employee: Guarantee letter (a company official or owner statement, which includes their contact details, offers the employee’s position, start date of employment, off-duty dates, and guarantees that the employee will return to his/her country and workplace after his/her travel), payrolls for the last 3 months, and the company trade license, all of which will be obtained from the company he/she works for. Kindly note that all the letters from the company should be Originally Signed and Stamped.
- If applicant is a company owner: A letter in the company letter head mentioning exact purpose, travel dates and financial undertaking signed and stamped. The company’s certificate of establishment and registration, the company’s trade license, and the company bank account statement showing transactions for the last 3 months (sealed, signed).
- If his/her spouse provides him/her: Documents requested from the above-mentioned employee or company owner regarding the providing spouse.
- Documents showing the financial position: Applicant’s personal up to date three (3) months bank statement at the time of submission of application originally stamped by the bank is required (The Bank Statements should be not older than 10 days the time of submission of the application in the Visa Application Centre), documents regarding the person's immovables located in Benin and Turkey (title deed, tenancy contract, trade license certificate etc.), and if any, his/her bank account statements available in Turkey. If another person provides him/her; then the above-mentioned documents for the provider must be presented.
- A copy of the Tenancy Contract or Title deed. In case the applicant does not have a tenancy contract or is living in a sharing accommodation, a letter of explanation is required.
- Group travels also require the following documents in addition to the above-mentioned documents:
- Documents regarding the company organizing the travel
- Applications are reviewed individually for group travels.
- If the applicant has close relative (Father/ Mother/ Siblings/ Child/ Spouse) then they must provide an invitation letter with their Turkish ID or Residency copies.
- Visa Application Fee.
Note: All the presented documentation must be up to date and complete. During the application for a Turkish visa, if the presented documentation is missing, this may cause a rejection in the procedure for a visa application as a result. Turkish Embassy/ Consulate, when required, shall ask for additional documentation from the applicant. The presentation of the above-mentioned documentation is not a guarantee that a visa will be granted/approved. In any case, a refund of fees shall not be possible. Every individual shall prepare their documentation separately (this includes family members and group applications).
Please also note that, it is mandatory to submit all the relevant documents in English or Turkish Language only.

## Visa Fees

[tur > mrt > en > Table:Tourism Single Visa > Visa Fees 1]
Please Note:
- The applicable fees will be collected in MRU. It is subject to change without notice.
- The above amounts are payable in cash at the Turkey Visa Application center
- All fees are non-refundable.

- Travel medical insurance valid for the duration of the visa or Copy of the insurance card and policy certificate indicating the area of coverage in Turkey.
- Family registration certificate issued in the name of the applicant (for family applications) and a copy of the birth certificate of minors in English is required. Kindly note that the birth certificate in only required if the name of the parents is not mentioned in the Passport.) - Work documents to be prepared by the applicant himself/herself or the person providing him/her:
- If applicant is an employee: Guarantee letter (a company official or owner statement, which includes their contact details, offers the employee’s position, start date of employment, off-duty dates, and guarantees that the employee will return to his/her country and workplace after his/her travel), payrolls for the last 3 months, and the company trade license, all of which will be obtained from the company he/she works for. Kindly note that all the letters from the company should be Originally Signed and Stamped.
- If applicant is a company owner: A letter in the company letter head mentioning exact purpose, travel dates and financial undertaking signed and stamped. The company’s certificate of establishment and registration, the company’s trade license, and the company bank account statement showing transactions for the last 3 months (sealed, signed).
- If his/her spouse provides him/her: Documents requested from the above-mentioned employee or company owner regarding the providing spouse.
- Documents showing the financial position: Applicant’s personal up to date three (3) months bank statement at the time of submission of application originally stamped by the bank is required (The Bank Statements should be not older than 10 days the time of submission of the application in the Visa Application Centre), documents regarding the person's immovables located in Benin and Turkey (title deed, tenancy contract, trade license certificate etc.), and if any, his/her bank account statements available in Turkey. - Visa Application Fee.
Note: All the presented documentation must be up to date and complete. During the application for a Turkish visa, if the presented documentation is missing, this may cause a rejection in the procedure for a visa application as a result. Turkish Embassy/ Consulate, when required, shall ask for additional documentation from the applicant. The presentation of the above-mentioned documentation is not a guarantee that a visa will be granted/approved. In any case, a refund of fees shall not be possible. Every individual shall prepare their documentation separately (this includes family members and group applications).
Please also note that, it is mandatory to submit all the relevant documents in English or Turkish Language only.

## Photo Specifications
- It should be in sharp focus and clean.
- It should be of high quality with no ink marks and creases.
- The photograph must show you looking directly at the camera.
- It should be 5cm x 6cm with White Background
- It should show your skin tone naturally.
- It should have appropriate brightness and contrast.
- The photograph should be a recent one not more than 6 months old.
- It is to be taken without headgear.
- It should be without hat/cap and without spectacles.
- It should be a portrait style image, with a neutral expression (no smiling or grinning)
- It should be without the applicant's hair tucked behind his/her ears.
- The photograph should not have any staple marks.

## Application Form
NOC for Minors (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/21FAJ4FVjq4LP8TcOCrDTC/485660a6303c35650202950bd42a9456/NO-OBJECTION-CERTIFICATE-Latest.pdf) and Spouse (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7cBstjX1zZ6Uqyivq4xNqa/77edd5eec815523272b3e69e707666a4/NOC-Spouse.pdf)
Sample Visa Application Form:
- Please click here (https://images.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6iH6rPsCax8f8N5wUB9RkK/c7a1da3347bc1a79b3ef9c7d261bdc42/sample-application-form-New.jpg) for a sample form which will help in filling the application form accurately. (Kindly note the attached is a sample of the Application form, for reference only)
- Please note that all fields are mandatory to be captured in Application form
- Also note that incase the applicants Surname/ First name is not mentioned or is blank in his/ her passport then the field must be repeated with the same name on the Application Form.
- Applicant’s complete name as per passport must be mentioned in the application form.
- Applicants are requested to click on the option “Add Person” for adding family members to the main applicant’s reference number. Please note family members reference number must be the same as per the main Applicant’s form.
Kindly note that all the documents uploaded for the Application Form must be as per requirement, if the documents uploaded are incorrect or not as per the requirement then a new Application form will have to be filled. Check document upload guide (http://liftpoc.vfsglobal.com.s3-website.eu-central-1.amazonaws.com/are/en/tur/images/Tourist-Visa-Application-Document-Upload-Guide.jpg) for your reference.

Kindly note that all the letters from the company should be Originally Signed and Stamped.
- If applicant is a company owner: A letter in the company letter head mentioning exact purpose, travel dates and financial undertaking signed and stamped. - It should have appropriate brightness and contrast.
- The photograph should be a recent one not more than 6 months old.
- It is to be taken without headgear.
- It should be without hat/cap and without spectacles.
- It should be a portrait style image, with a neutral expression (no smiling or grinning)

- It should have appropriate brightness and contrast.
- The photograph should be a recent one not more than 6 months old.
- It is to be taken without headgear.
- It should be without hat/cap and without spectacles.
- It should be a portrait style image, with a neutral expression (no smiling or grinning)

If another person provides him/her; then the above-mentioned documents for the provider must be presented.
- A copy of the Tenancy Contract or Title deed. In case the applicant does not have a tenancy contract or is living in a sharing accommodation, a letter of explanation is required.
- Group travels also require the following documents in addition to the above-mentioned documents:
- Documents regarding the company organizing the travel
- Applications are reviewed individually for group travels.
- If the applicant has close relative (Father/ Mother/ Siblings/ Child/ Spouse) then they must provide an invitation letter with their Turkish ID or Residency copies.
- Visa Application Fee.
Note: All the presented documentation must be up to date and complete. Turkish Embassy/ Consulate, when required, shall ask for additional documentation from the applicant. The presentation of the above-mentioned documentation is not a guarantee that a visa will be granted/approved. In any case, a refund of fees shall not be possible. Every individual shall prepare their documentation separately (this includes family members and group applications).
Please also note that, it is mandatory to submit all the relevant documents in English or Turkish Language only.

## Photo Specifications

- It should be in sharp focus and clean.
- It should be of high quality with no ink marks and creases.
- The photograph must show you looking directly at the camera.
- It should be 5cm x 6cm with White Background
- It should show your skin tone naturally.
- It should have appropriate brightness and contrast.
- The photograph should be a recent one not more than 6 months old.
- It is to be taken without headgear.
- It should be without hat/cap and without spectacles.
- It should be a portrait style image, with a neutral expression (no smiling or grinning)
